title: Baofeng GMSK
short description: Proprietary GMSK mode used for voice by Fujian Baofeng walkie talkies
description:
Proprietary GMSK mode used for digital voice by Fujian Baofeng walkie talkies. At least supported by the following models:

- Alervites AT-W31D (FCC ID: [2BBGD-AT31D](https://fcc.report/FCC-ID/2BBGD-AT31D))
- Baofeng 1901D (FCC ID: [2AJGM-1901D](https://fcc.report/FCC-ID/2AJGM-1901D))
- Baofeng 888SD (FCC ID: [2AJGM-888SD](https://fcc.report/FCC-ID/2AJGM-888SD))
- Baofeng T20D (FCC ID: [2AJGM-T20D](https://fcc.report/FCC-ID/2AJGM-T20D))
- Baofeng V1D (FCC ID: [2AJGM-V1D](https://fcc.report/FCC-ID/2AJGM-V1D))
- Baofeng V12D/GT68PRO (FCC ID: [2AJGM-V12D](https://fcc.report/FCC-ID/2AJGM-V12D))
- Baofeng W31D (FCC ID: [2AJGM-W31D](https://fcc.report/FCC-ID/2AJGM-W31D))
 
According to FCC filings, it uses TDMA on a 12.5KHz channel, with GMSK at data rate of 10248 bps. However, the SDR waterfall suggests there is no such TDMA applied.

The protocol has some sort of 5-bit encryption or selective call mechanism, specified as a number from 0 to 31 on the CPS.
